seo.title: Rum and Raisin Cake - Marinda Kook

html:
I joked and said that if your drinks run out at night, give people some of the cake. I wanted to bake a nice moist rum and raisin cake. After failures and flops I put this recipe together. It's deliciously moist and you can taste the rum! If I can bake it, you can too.

SYRUP: (make this first because it needs to cool) In the microwave melt 250 ml sugar, 250 ml water and 100 ml rum. This takes about 5 minutes. Stir it until the sugar has dissolved.

 

 

 

 

 

CAKE:

  • 250 ml cake flour
  • 30ml baking powder
  • 30ml cocoa
  • 5 ml salt
  • 250 g butter
  • 180g chocolate ( one large slab)
  • 5 eggs
  • 125 ml sugar
  • 80 ml rum

NOW:

  1. Melt the butter, rum and chocolate in the microwave. About 2 minutes – stir regularly. Add the sugar and microwave for another 2 minutes – stir regularly..
  2. Sift the cake flour, baking powder, salt and cocoa into your mixing bowl.
  3. Mix the chocolate mixture into your flour mixture.
  4. Now beat in the eggs one at a time.
  5. Pour the mixture into a bundt pan or springform pan that has been greased and bake for 40 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.
  6. When the cake is done baking, immediately pour the cold syrup over it and let it cool in the pan.

DECORATION ON TOP OF THE CAKE

Melt one slab of raisin and nut chocolate with 100 ml cream. Pour over the cooled cake.
